name: Button
description: M3 button with pill shape (rounded-full) by default. Supports filled, tonal, outlined, elevated, and text variants per Material Design 3 spec.
example:
<Button className="rounded-full">Save changes</Button>
<Button variant="tonal" className="rounded-full">Secondary action</Button>
<Button variant="outline" className="rounded-full">Cancel</Button>
never: Never use rounded-lg or rounded-md on buttons -- M3 buttons are rounded-full (pill shape)
Never hardcode colors -- use variant prop
Never make buttons shorter than 40px (button-md) -- M3 requires comfortable touch targets
